hero.headline:
Sri Lankan voices.
Australian home.
hero.subline: Trusted news, current affairs, drama and music for the Sri Lankan diaspora — broadcasting live from Melbourne to the world.

community.title: Vishvavahini is yours
community.body: As a community-owned channel we rely on viewers, sponsors and advertisers to stay on air. Help us tell Sri Lankan stories from Australian soil.
